subject: grammar
title: Error Correction: Modal Verbs in Writing
instruction: Read the extract from an Academic Writing Task 2. Decide if the underlined phrases are correct or not. Type '✓' if they are right and type the correct version if they are wrong.
passage:
Pollution is causing enormous problems all over the world these days. Governments 1 [1] quickly to stop this problem before it is too late.

The first thing I believe we 2 [2] is reduce the amount we use our cars. Our governments 3 [3] us to use public transport. In my country, public transport is not very reliable, so the first thing that governments 4 [4] is to ensure that buses and trains are a viable alternative to the car. They 5 [5] the costs to the public of travelling on public transport.

However, it is not only the government that 6 [6] an effort. All of us 7 [7] some effort to reduce pollution. First of all we 8 [8] to walk or cycle if we can, rather than using our cars. In the past people 9 [9] or cycle because they did not have cars. It is a shame that we have become so dependent on cars now. Secondly, we 10 [10] to share car use with our friends and colleagues.

All of us 11 [11] some changes to our lives if we want to reduce pollution. Fortunately, we 12 [12] big changes to make big improvements in the situation.

questions.answer: don't have to make|||needn't make|||don't need to make
